findings.finding: Task 2's byte-identity test asserts a negative (settings.local.json never appears) whose meaningfulness rests on the _isolate_home fixture pre-creating ~/.claude/, not on the code under test; it would pass trivially and mask a regression if the fixture later stopped pre-creating .claude/. Add an assertion that the lockfile ~/.claude/.settings.local.json.lock is never created (validate_settings->_acquire_lock creates it today) as a fixture-independent signal.
findings.reviewer_angle: Hidden pre-flight dependency on the removed validate_settings
findings.evidence_quote: assert the file is byte-identical (or still absent) afterward. Use the _isolate_home fixture (:58) for the temp HOME.
